cells.rationale: Pure mechanical extraction of an existing SQL constant into a shared module with two verbatim import swaps and inline-copy deletions across three explicitly named files; unambiguous no-behavioral-change acceptance makes it Spark-reliable, and the byte-consistency invariant is preserved mechanically (not intelligence-bound), so the opus/security gate does not fire; medium band fits a multi-file mechanical refactor.
